prompt:
My navbar links have weird spacing - the gap between them is not consistent and on mobile they overflow. I'm using Tailwind. Here's the code:
Home About Contact Blog
How do I fix the spacing and make it mobile responsive?

assertions.name: identifies_missing_gap
assertions.description: Identifies that the flex container is missing gap/spacing utilities

assertions.name: provides_tailwind_fix
assertions.description: Provides Tailwind-specific classes as the solution
